notes: Analyst labels (ideaType, whyWeakFoundersBuyIn, etc.) are for humans and reporting only — not appended to prompts. Founder-facing pitch is in description.

ideas.name: Ghostwriter X
ideas.description: AI that rewrites your feed posts in your voice, A/B-tests hooks, and auto-schedules the winners. Agencies call it cheating; founders call it compounding founder brand. Ships as a Chrome extension + queue. Raised friends-and-family.
ideas.outcome_notes: Commoditized GTM infra; churn when engagement looks fake.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Clear before/after metrics (impressions, replies) and obvious AI tailwind.
ideas.structuralWeakness: No workflow lock-in; native platform tools and model APIs collapse differentiation.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Race to the bottom on price; platforms throttle third-party automation.

ideas.name: InboxCupid
ideas.description: Turns cold outreach into a daily pipeline: paste ICP, it drafts hyper-personal DMs and follow-ups from LinkedIn + news hooks. Claims 3× reply rates vs templates. PLG at $29/mo.
ideas.outcome_notes: API + policy risk; deliverable is replaceable copy.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Sales is measurable; 'AI SDR' is an investable narrative.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Shallow value (text gen); deliverability and account bans become the real product.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Users burn domains, churn, incumbents bundle same models.

ideas.name: Nomenclate
ideas.description: Brandable .com generator with trademark screens, logo sketches, and one-click landing copy. Positioned as the first thing you do after an idea hits Notes app. Viral loop via shareable name boards.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Everyone needs a name; feels creative and fun.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Episodic use, zero switching cost, easy to copy.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Spiky acquisition then silent graveyard of abandoned projects.

ideas.name: DeckSmith
ideas.description: Pitch decks from a Notion outline: narrative arc, market slides, and speaker notes tuned to 'top-tier VC taste.' Team selling to accelerators as white-label.
ideas.outcome_notes: Outputs converge; buyers won't pay recurring.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Fundraising anxiety is acute; obvious willingness-to-pay story.
ideas.structuralWeakness: No proprietary data; output quality is subjective and converges across tools.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: One-time purchases; Canva, Google, Notion bundle generation.

ideas.name: EchoNote
ideas.description: Meetings → auto-summaries that push action items into Slack and Jira with owner guesses. 'Chief of Staff for every IC.' Focus on remote teams under 200 people.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Meetings are hated; productivity AI is default hot.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Thin layer on Zoom/Meet/Teams; accuracy liability without deep integrations.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: IT blocks bots; Microsoft/Google ship native parity.

ideas.name: VibeReply
ideas.description: Email replier that matches your historical tone and negotiates meeting slots. Markets to execs who want inbox zero without hiring an EA. $40/user/mo.
ideas.outcome_notes: Trust ceiling for autonomous send; security reviews kill deals.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: High willingness to pay for time; clear ROI narrative.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Permissioning, hallucination risk, and procurement block enterprise.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Stuck in prosumer; one bad send nukes the brand.

ideas.name: PromptPantry
ideas.description: Subscription library of 'battle-tested' prompts for GTM, hiring, and PR—ranked by community upvotes and clone-to-clipboard. Think GitHub for system prompts.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Network effects lore; community flies on Twitter.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Non-excludable IP; drift as models update makes library stale.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Attention moves to assistants; churn to free repos and model defaults.

ideas.name: CloutCopilot
ideas.description: AI chief-of-staff for creator-founder identity: drafts threads, analyzes what performed, proposes contrarian angles. Targets post-raise founders rebuilding public presence.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Identity anxiety + status games are emotionally loud.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Feeds reward human messiness; robotic cadence hurts performance.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Growth stalls when voice homogenizes; refund noise.

ideas.name: SignalScrub
ideas.description: Ingest PDFs, podcasts, and newsletters into a nightly 'what changed' dossier with cited bullets. Analysts-as-a-service vibe for overstimulated founders.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Information overload feels existential; summaries feel magical.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Thin summarization wrapper; NotebookLM-class tools eat the wedge.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Users downgrade to chat + bookmarks; unpaid power users dominate.

ideas.name: SliceAI
ideas.description: Micro-SaaS that turns Stripe invoices into one dashboard explaining recurring stack spend and drafts polite downgrade outreach. Markets to thrift-focused indie hackers.
ideas.outcome_notes: Broken permissions trust; Stripe relationship risk.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Tool sprawl pain is visceral among builder Twitter.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Finance access requires extreme trust; low ACV kills support burden.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Support fires; banks and Stripe clamp partner behavior.

ideas.name: SniffScout
ideas.description: Airbnb-style overnight stays matched by breed, temperament cameras, and 'paw-rated' hosts. Celebrity vet advisors on landing page.
ideas.outcome_notes: Trust + fragmented supply vs Rover incumbency.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Emotional hook; Airbnb metaphor feels pitch-perfect.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Chicken-and-egg liquidity; incidents create existential liability narrative.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Thin local density; concentrates on rover-sitter quasi-pros.

ideas.name: GigBridge
ideas.description: Two-sided gigs for rehearsal rooms, merch runners, session players, last-minute substitutions. 'Uber reliability for chaotic tours.' Targets mid-tier indie artists.
ideas.outcome_notes: Low repeat rate; ops chaos at scale.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Passion vertical + obvious pain stories from artists.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Demand is episodic; supply quality variance destroys trust overnight.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Becomes unmanaged Craigslist corner; churn on first bad gig.

ideas.name: FoundrSpark
ideas.description: Tinder UI for cofounders with 'commitment contracts' templates and vesting calculators. Investor updates compare match velocity to dating apps.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Loneliness and speed-to-startup fantasies dominate accelerators.
ideas.structuralWeakness: One bad match nukes reputation; most users lurk forever.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Ghost town after hype launch; lawsuits from rushed matches.

ideas.name: IdeaBourse
ideas.description: Buy/sell 'validated' startup concepts with traction packets, teardown videos, and NDA workflows. DAO-governance optional on roadmap deck.
ideas.outcome_notes: No enforceable uniqueness; reputational lemons market.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Flipping ideas feels edgy and efficient.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Ideas aren't scarce; asymmetric info makes market a flea circus.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Spam listings; founders realize ideas are worthless without execution density.

ideas.name: SkillHour
ideas.description: Micro-classes sold in 55-minute increments with escrow; teachers set dynamic pricing based on attendance heatmaps. TikTok funnel for teenage hobbyists.
ideas.outcome_notes: Thin take rate vs Zoom + PayPal substitutes.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: 'Future of credentialing meets passion economy.'
ideas.structuralWeakness: No habit outside spikes; superstar teachers bypass platform.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Leakage to private Venmo calendars; moderation costs explode.

ideas.name: ShelfSwap Local
ideas.description: Neighborhood storefronts trade slow-moving SKU slots week-to-week with dynamic QR merchandising. 'Liquidity for bodega shelf space.'
ideas.outcome_notes: Ops-heavy; trust without standardized contracts fails.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Physical retail pain feels untapped by pure software.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Requires feet on ground; coordination tax > value for small shops.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Adoption in one zip code; cannot seed parallel cities.

ideas.name: Vanlife Pit Stop
ideas.description: Hosts rent driveway power, gray-water dump, and Wi-Fi to vanlifers with reviews and insurance bundle. Influencer-heavy launch.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Aesthetic tribe marketing; storytelling writes itself.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Regulatory fragmentation; supply is inconvenient and intermittent.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Incidents spike insurance; platform blamed.

ideas.name: GardenGang
ideas.description: Match homeowners who want micro-farms with landscape crews subsidized by municipal climate grants. NFT 'plot deeds' mothballed but still in FAQs.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Climate narrative + community feels mission-led.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Thin repeat demand beyond install; bureaucracy varies by town.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Subsidy cliff; crews disintermediate homeowners.

ideas.name: SeniorSwaps
ideas.description: Elder companionship micro-stays traded between families with background checks layered on Airbnb-style reputations.
ideas.outcome_notes: Safety brand impossible at startup scale.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Huge demographic tailwind and emotional resonance.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Trust density requirements dwarf seed-stage capability.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: One incident ends the company; slows to hospice-adjacent red tape.

ideas.name: WarRoom AI
ideas.description: Single glass pane for KPIs, OKR deltas, morale pulse surveys, and 'AI board prep memos.' Marketing line: CEOs deserve a cockpit, not seventeen tabs.
ideas.outcome_notes: Integration long tail; CIO owns budget.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Control fantasy resonates with first-time CEOs.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Reads as nice-to-have analytics; overlaps BI and HRIS roadmap.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Pilot churn after dashboard fatigue; Salesforce/Microsoft bundle.

ideas.name: FounderOS
ideas.description: Second brain blending journal, stakeholder map, and decision logs with GPT weekly reviews. Targets seed-stage CEOs only.
ideas.outcome_notes: No acute workflow substitution vs Notion/Obsidian.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Therapy-coded productivity sells to overwhelmed operators.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Substitution from generic PKM plus chat; ambiguous ROI.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Power users export markdown and cancel.

ideas.name: BoardGhost
ideas.description: Generates investor update narratives, preempts board FAQs, simulates skeptical partner personas. Priced like a fractional chief of staff subscription.
ideas.outcome_notes: Trust ceiling; partners detect synthetic tone.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Board dread is asymmetric pain for first-time founders.
ideas.structuralWeakness: High-stakes comms dislike automation; hallucination unacceptable.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Used once per quarter episodically; finance leaders block.

ideas.name: Apex Circle
ideas.description: Invite-only Slack replacement with prestige badges, stealth mode rooms, and 'signal verified' introductions to angels—$200/mo for 'serious founders only.'
ideas.outcome_notes: Premium chat without differentiated utility collapses.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Status hierarchies monetize cleanly in aspiration economy.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Parasocial engagement; lurkers overwhelm contributors.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Becomes shouty promo channel; churn when intros don't convert.

ideas.name: Velocity Totem
ideas.description: Desk totem + app that flashes team 'velocity score' synthesized from commits, demos shipped, founder sleep. Ships with limited edition ceramics.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Tactile fetish meets hustle culture meme.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Passive-aggressive vibes erode psychological safety overnight.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: HR forbids adoption; gimmick fades post-launch TikTok spike.

ideas.name: Moonshot AM
ideas.description: AI morning brief that guilt-tilts you toward 'important vs urgent,' blocks calendars aggressively, assigns micro-debates between co-founders.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Identity of discipline markets well on podcasts.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Adds overhead rather than shaving it; resentment curve steep.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Disabled after three weeks except for solo founders—who churn poorest.

ideas.name: SignalSeat
ideas.description: Tracks who owes you introductions, reciprocity favors, warm intro debt with push reminders—'relationship equity quantified.'
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Networking feels asymmetric; gamification appeals to engineers.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Reputation risk if contacts discover scoring; ethically icky demos.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Stealth usage then abandonment after awkward leak.

ideas.name: Manifest Engine
ideas.description: Vision-board app with text-to-visual 'future PR headlines' claiming to subconsciously steer decisions; sells workshops to accelerators bundled.
ideas.outcome_notes: Adjacent to woo; churn when KPIs diverge.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Meaning hunger in uncertain journeys.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Anti-empirical; embarrassing for serious teams past seed.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Word-of-mouth dies in mainstream B2B; refund storms.

ideas.name: AuraFeed
ideas.description: Token-curiosity social feed where 'belief scores' reorder posts; vaguely Web3 treasury for top creators roadmap. Targets gen Z 'future natives.'
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: 'Owning the algo' resonates post-TikTok anxiety.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Thin utility beyond vibes; infra costs swamp seed budgets.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Downloads stall; treasury drama becomes punchline.

ideas.name: Skinverse Lite
ideas.description: AI-generated avatars for meetings and dating profiles with 'micro-expression authenticity sliders.' Ships mobile-first stickers then multi-platform bridge.
ideas.outcome_notes: No daily habit vs camera AR incumbents.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Personalization hype + identity play looks viral.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Synthetic trust cliff in romance and work contexts.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Feature of Snapchat/Instagram; novelty half-life measured in weeks.

ideas.name: DopaMax
ideas.description: Streak-heavy productivity RPG with biometric 'focus coins' monetized via boosts. Slogan: 'Make discipline dopaminergic, not punitive.' VC deck cites Stanford habit lab cosign rumor.
ideas.outcome_notes: Retention gimmicks exhaust; FTC scrutiny adjacent.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Gamification graphs look growth-hacky and fundable.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Habit substitutes are crowded; burnout flips polarity against app.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Cohort novelty cliff; UA costs unbearable vs Duolingo-class giants.

ideas.name: ChainClout Mini
ideas.description: Micro-tip rail for TikTok clones with collectible 'moment seals.' Smart contract word salad for investors; MVP is Stripe + database.
ideas.outcome_notes: Chain theater without differentiated custody story.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Creators yelling 'ownership' primes checkbooks.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Fans won't tolerate wallet friction for petty tips.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Regulators circle; influencers quietly revert to fiat links.

ideas.name: SynthParty
ideas.description: AI-hosted party rooms riffing off text prompts—'radio theater but infinite.' Monetize via collectible episode NFTs lite (digital merch only).
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: 'Generative entertainment' headline fits 202x zeitgeist.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Cost per minute high; mediocre AI kills vibe fast.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Short hype cycle; copyrights and moderation sink ships.

ideas.name: MirrorRun
ideas.description: AR jogging paths where ghost avatars pace you from strangers' anonymized bests. 'Ambient competitive belonging.'
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Peloton fatigue drives 'outside' metaphors.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Low-frequency exercise habit; hardware battery complaints.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Strava-ish incumbents add lighter features; wedge evaporates.

ideas.name: DreamTrade
ideas.description: Users record dreams via voice; LLM swaps narrative fragments anonymously 'collage futures.' Monetize premium archetype reports.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: 'Collective subconscious' storyline seduces techno-spirituals.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Content moderation for trauma outputs; embarrassment factor.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: DAU melts after TikTok fad; stigma in sharing dreams.

ideas.name: LuckLayer
ideas.description: Push notifications proposing 'lucky windows' synthesized from astrology heuristics, weather API, headline sentiment—sold as probabilistic mindfulness.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Crossover of astrology TAM spreadsheets for VCs joking-but-not.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Parasocial trust requires celebrity endorsements churn.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: App Store policy risk; backlash when predictions feel exploitative.

ideas.name: FOMO Fields
ideas.description: Pop-up scavenger hunts geofenced to conferences with ephemeral token rewards for selfies at sponsor booths—'IRL quests for the attention economy.'
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Event marketers desperate for measurable foot traffic gimmicks.
ideas.structuralWeakness: No year-round utilization; reliant on flaky sponsor budgets.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Becomes experiential agency with worse margins pretending to be software.

ideas.name: RiseTeen Grid
ideas.description: Exclusive Discord-with-guardrails for ambitious teens: project showcases, college essay circles, billionaire biography book clubs moderated by undergrads.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Parent anxiety + hustle culture aesthetics.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Trust/legal burden astronomical relative to monetization.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Shut down chatter after incident; Stripe holds funds.

ideas.name: Founders Hideout
ideas.description: $150/m 'third space' memberships online with rituals: silent co-working bells, thematic grief circles about cap tables, AMAs recorded as collectible audio.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: 'Loneliness epidemic of founders' is repeated on podcasts endlessly.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Performative empathy fatigue; overlaps with AA-for-founders substitutes.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Churn when intros dry; resentment at paywall for vulnerability.

ideas.name: Maker Monastery
ideas.description: 30-day cloister Zoom seasons that force shipping sprints plus shared Notion doctrines; alumni NFT badges optional.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Ritual branding feels differentiated vs generic cowork.
ideas.structuralWeakness: High facilitator burn; novelty per season must escalate unsustainably.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Alumni quietly join free Discords; SaaS metrics hollow.

ideas.name: CityAlpha
ideas.description: Hyper-local founder dens mapped as heatmaps promising density-based intros each Friday; premium tier sponsors coffee credits.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Analog shortage post-remote boom romanticized.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Cold start per metro; overlaps meetups nobody attends twice.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Only SF/NYC work thinly; rest are ghost grids.

ideas.name: PeerGuild
ideas.description: Rotating masterminds for PMs transitioning to founders, with algorithmic cohort remix every six weeks aiming for novelty.
ideas.outcome_notes: Relationships need stability; churn from remix.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Networking product market fit stories repeat on Twitter.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Trust formation conflicts with churning groups.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Groups bifurcate into WhatsApp escapes sans payment.

ideas.name: Ambient Campfire
ideas.description: Always-on low-talk audio lounges with crackling sfx and whisper-speed conversation rules, marketed as antidote to loud Clubhouse clones.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Trend of 'digital silence' resonates after notification fatigue narratives.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Parasocial boredom; moderation for creepy behavior hard at whisper scale.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: DAU asymptotes tiny; infra costs outweigh tips.

ideas.name: AltUmi
ideas.description: Reverse mentorship bundles where teens teach execs slang for brand safety retainers billed to marketing departments; youth coaches paid flat stipends.
ideas.outcome_notes: Compliance + brand risk if youth opinions go viral wrong.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Cross-generational intrigue seduces novelty-hungry CMO narratives.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Thin repeat purchase beyond stunt workshops.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: HR blocks youth interactions; backlash cycles.

ideas.name: Quiet Ladder
ideas.description: Non-performative LinkedIn—anonymous ladders where people log rejections silently; karma unlocks mentorship lotteries.
ideas.outcome_notes: Dark emotions platform risks self-harm optics.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Pain narrative around job searching is loud on social.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Without identity, signaling value low; negativity spiral.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Media frames as depression hole; churn after catharsis week.

ideas.name: Ritual Stack
ideas.description: Team culture OS prescribing micro-rituals (gratitude pings, mascot polls) synced to Slack; sells culture KPIs dashboards to overstretched managers.
ideas.outcome_notes: HR tech buyers skeptical; fad fatigue.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Remote culture pain is endlessly discussed.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Instrumentation of vibes breeds cynicism rapidly.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Disabled by employees as spam channels.

ideas.name: AuraScan Meet
ideas.description: Post-meeting emotional resonance heatmaps distilled from tonal prosody (claim); integrations with Zoom webhook exports.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Managers grasp for 'culture analytics' buzzwords.
ideas.structuralWeakness: No forcing function tied to revenue or delivery SLAs.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Works councils / unions block; pilots don't renew.

ideas.name: ShotSort AI
ideas.description: Auto-labels screenshots by 'intent' (bug, receipt, inspo) and routes to correct folder + OCR tasks. Markets to 'visual thinkers.'
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Everyone hoards screenshots; pain feels universal.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Shallow taxonomies break; low WTP vs free OS features.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Adoption as toy; silent churn after disk savings realize marginal.

ideas.name: TabAesthetic
ideas.description: Enterprise policy-friendly browser skinning with focus palettes and 'manager-approved vibe packs'—claims 7% focus lift from color psych studies.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: 'Employee experience' budgets post-2020 remote wave.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Procurement requires security reviews for extension surface area.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Blocked by default; prosumer ARPU too low.

ideas.name: EmojiOracle
ideas.description: Correlates emoji velocity in Slack channels with 'burnout precursor indices' surfaced to People Ops fortnightly decks.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: People analytics budgets exist; vibes feel measurable.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Slack internals or HRIS roadmap likely duplicates; ethically explosive.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Employees sabotage emoji usage; pilots axed.

ideas.name: LotLens
ideas.description: Computer vision lite on existing security cams estimating office parking fullness for hybrid return mandates. Targets mid-market CFO cost saves.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Hybrid mandates create spreadsheet pain.
ideas.structuralWeakness: One-time calibration projects masquerading as SaaS.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Facility vendors bundle; CIO deprioritizes.

ideas.name: PraiseForge
ideas.description: AI-crafted peer recognition bursts auto-timed around sprint closes; integrations to HRIS for points redemption.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Recognition software category exists.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Bots replace human specificity; sarcastic misuse.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Meme mocking on Blind; rollout halted.

ideas.name: CanvasCapture AI
ideas.description: Snaps workshop whiteboards weekly in offices, vectorizes scribbles into Jira drafts (no more archaeology). Markets to agile coaches.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Pain of lost decisions resonate anecdotally.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Hardware installs + handwriting variance brittle; episodic ROI.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Miro dominance; camera-only fidelity insufficient.

ideas.name: KudosMail
ideas.description: Polite refusal + compliment sandwich generator tied to Gmail metrics' billed as burnout reducer for overloaded managers.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: Inbox overwhelm is visceral recurring pain meme.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Standalone email GPT thin; mistrust autonomous send.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Monthly active dies; Microsoft announces similar.

ideas.name: CarbonNudgeDesk
ideas.description: Desktop microcopy nudges about printing, travel approvals, cafeteria choices aggregated into monthly team 'leaf scores.' Sells virtue dashboards to midsize SaaS ops.
ideas.whyWeakFoundersBuyIn: ESG checkboxes woo HR and brand teams.
ideas.structuralWeakness: Employees resent surveillance moralizing.
ideas.likelyFailureMode: Internal sabotage jokes; CIO removes clients.
